diffs.diff:
--- a/model.py
+++ b/model.py
@@ -55,4 +55,19 @@
         focal_weight = self.alpha * torch.pow(1 - prob_true, self.gamma)

         ce_loss = -torch.log(prob_true + 1e-7)  # Add epsilon for numerical stability

         focal_loss = focal_weight * ce_loss

-        return focal_loss.mean()
+        return focal_loss.mean()

+

+class MeanAbsoluteError(nn.Module):

+    def __init__(self, num_classes=100):

+        super(MeanAbsoluteError, self).__init__()

+        self.num_classes = num_classes

+        self.eps = 1e-7  # Small epsilon for numerical stability

+

+    def forward(self, pred, targets):

+        # Apply softmax to get probabilities

+        prob = torch.softmax(pred, dim=1)

+        # Create one-hot encoding of targets

+        one_hot = torch.zeros_like(pred).scatter_(1, targets.unsqueeze(1), 1)

+        # Calculate MAE between predicted probabilities and one-hot encoded targets

+        mae_loss = 1 - torch.sum(prob * one_hot, dim=1)

+        return mae_loss.mean()

--- a/train.py
+++ b/train.py
@@ -6,7 +6,7 @@

 import pickle

-from model import RobustCIFAR100N, MeanAbsoluteError

+from model import RobustCIFAR100N, FocalLoss

 import logging

@@ -52,8 +52,8 @@
     

     # Initialize model

     model = RobustCIFAR100N(num_classes=100).to(device)

-    # Use MAE loss instead of cross entropy

-    criterion = MeanAbsoluteError(num_classes=100)

+    # Use Focal loss instead of cross entropy

+    criterion = FocalLoss(alpha=1, gamma=2, num_classes=100)

     optimizer = optim.Adam(model.parameters(), lr=0.001, weight_decay=1e-4)

     scheduler = optim.lr_scheduler.StepLR(optimizer, step_size=10, gamma=0.1)
